theme_and_archetype.vibe: Authority, Clarity, Functional, Brutalist, Minimalistic Modern Black and White
theme_and_archetype.rationale: For a tech-based club ('THE MOMENT CLUB') hosting hackathons, a pure monochrome aesthetic communicates precision, cutting-edge technology, and modernism. Color is stripped away to focus entirely on function and typography.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
No generic 'Inter' for headings. Use Outfit for high impact.
Never center text by default. Use explicit alignment. Keep paragraphs left-aligned for readability.
Strict monochrome. No purple, no teal. No generic SaaS blue.
Use Pure White (#FFFFFF) and Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) as primary anchors.
Ensure text meets APCA standards. Contrast must be absolute.
Hover states must inverse colors (e.g., Black button becomes White with Black text).

marketing_layout.description: Asymmetry, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Overlapping elements, stark divisions.

dashboard_layout.description: Dense, compact spacing (gap-4 or gap-6). 1px sharp solid borders. No soft shadows. Cardless flat surfaces.

rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly in marketing pages; leave negative space.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (surface color), 1px sharp border (border-border), rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px). NO SHADOWS.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (dark mode) or bg-white/70 (light mode) with a 1px delicate inner stroke at the bottom.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). High contrast. Solid fill or 1px outline.

customizations: Strip Shadcn's default rounded-md to rounded-none or rounded-sm.
Tabs: Use strict underline styles or monochrome block toggles.
Marquee: Use pure CSS or react-fast-marquee. Text must be large, uppercase, outline style (text-transparent stroke-white) for high energy.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Invert colors on hover. Example: hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors duration-200.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast, mechanical transitions. duration-150 or duration-200. No bouncy springs.
interactions_and_motion.entrance: Staggered fade and slide-up (translate-y-4) for lists and dashboard elements using Framer Motion.

media.rules: All images must be black and white. Use gradient overlays (bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/50 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast.

club_logo.description: Minimalist modern logo typography for THE MOMENT CLUB.

hero_background.description: Abstract minimalist black and white geometric shapes, tech network lines for the landing page hero section.

event_hackathon_1.description: Dark room coding session. Use for 'About Us' or Tech events.

event_hackathon_2.description: High-end photography of developers at a hackathon. Use for Event Cards.

campus_architecture.description: Modern architecture. Use for 'About Club' background or context imagery.

attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='login-faculty-tab', data-testid='register-submit-button', data-testid='event-card-hackathon'.

instructions_to_main_agent.overall_direction: You are building a hybrid platform. The landing page must be a creative, highly-visual marketing experience with a 'Kinetic Texture' marquee and overlapping Bento grids. The dashboards must be strictly functional 'Control Rooms' with dense data presentation and zero decorative fluff.
page_specifics: Landing Page: Implement a fixed crystal-glass header. Use the `hero_background` image with a dark overlay. Below the hero, run a `react-fast-marquee` displaying latest tech notifications.
Auth Pages: Minimalist split layout. Left side stark black with the `club_logo` and tagline. Right side stark white/dark grey form with Shadcn Tabs for Role selection (Core / Faculty / Member).
Dashboards: Use a grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 layout with a sidebar. Tables must have sharp borders (border-collapse). No generic Vercel look.
strict_rules: Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). ONLY use the media URLs provided.
Do not use generic fonts for Headings. Stick to the font strategy.
Do not add any colored gradients. Only use black, white, and grayscale.
Always apply data-testid to buttons, inputs, and links.
